title: calophyllum mesoamericanum
intro: Calophyllum mesoamericanum, also known as the Mexican Calophyllum, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Calophyllaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Calophyllum mesoamericanum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark and leaves are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally to leverage its medicinal properties.
